display.purpose: Greeting only; never controls or labels.

mono.purpose: Model IDs, token counts, code labels, and parameter values.

shadows.name: legacy-composer-lift
shadows.purpose: Existing old composer elevation; avoid for new ordinary controls.

shadows.name: dropdown-lift
shadows.purpose: Temporary overlay separation for dropdowns above the composer.

motion.name: state-standard
motion.purpose: Default hover, focus, and control state transitions.

components.name: Composer Surface
components.description: The central prompt container before chat and bottom composer during chat.
components.css: .ds-composer { background: #2b2c32; color: #eff2fb; border: 1px solid #3a3d46; border-radius: 22px; padding: 14px 14px 10px; width: 684px; max-width: 100%; } .ds-composer textarea { width: 100%; min-height: 36px; background: transparent; color: #eff2fb; border: 0; resize: none; font: 14px/1.5 ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; outline: none; } .ds-composer textarea::placeholder { color: #a2a8b6; } .ds-composer-row { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; gap: 8px; padding-top: 6px; } .ds-composer button { border: 0; border-radius: 999px; background: transparent; color: #a2a8b6; padding: 6px 9px; font: 600 12px/1 ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-composer button:hover, .ds-composer button:focus-visible { background: #343640; color: #eff2fb; outline: 2px solid #5b7cfa; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Suggestion Chip
components.description: Compact prompt starter for the welcome screen.
components.css: .ds-suggestion-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; min-height: 38px; padding: 7px 11px; border-radius: 999px; border: 1px solid #3a3d46; background: rgba(91,124,250,0.15); color: #eff2fb; font: 600 12px/1 ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; } .ds-suggestion-chip:hover, .ds-suggestion-chip:focus-visible { background: #343640; border-color: #5b7cfa; outline: 2px solid #5b7cfa; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-chip-icon { color: #5b7cfa; }

components.name: Status Pill
components.description: Compact service-state indicator in the app header.
components.css: .ds-status-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 999px; background: transparent; color: #a2a8b6; padding: 5px 9px; font: 600 11px/1 ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-status-pill:hover, .ds-status-pill:focus-visible { color: #eff2fb; background: #2a2b31; outline: 2px solid #5b7cfa; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: #8ea2ff; }

components.name: Notification Toast
components.description: Compact lower-corner notification with state icon, title, message, dismiss action, and timeout meter.
components.html:
i
Notice
Local status updated.
components.css: .ds-toast { position: relative; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 28px minmax(0,1fr) 30px; gap: 10px; min-height: 64px; overflow: hidden; padding: 12px 10px 12px 12px; border: 1px solid #3a3d46; border-radius: 16px; background: #202126; color: #eff2fb; box-shadow: 0 8px 14px rgba(0,0,0,0.16); font: 12px/1.38 ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-toast-icon { display: grid; place-items: center; width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 50%; color: #5b7cfa; background: rgba(91,124,250,0.15); font-weight: 800; } .ds-toast-title { font-weight: 760; color: #eff2fb; } .ds-toast-message { color: #a2a8b6; } .ds-toast button { width: 30px; height: 30px; border: 0; border-radius: 50%; background: transparent; color: #737988; } .ds-toast button:hover, .ds-toast button:focus-visible { color: #eff2fb; background: #2a2b31; outline: 2px solid #5b7cfa; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-toast-meter { position: absolute; left: 12px; right: 12px; bottom: 6px; height: 2px; border-radius: 999px; background: #5b7cfa; opacity: 0.42; }

components.name: Settings Field
components.description: Dense settings input for endpoints and workflow values.
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 6px; color: #eff2fb; font: 600 11px/1.2 ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-field input { width: 100%; border: 1px solid #3a3d46; border-radius: 8px; background: #111214; color: #eff2fb; padding: 8px; font: 11px/1.4 ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Consolas, monospace; outline: none; } .ds-field input:focus-visible { border-color: #5b7cfa; outline: 2px solid rgba(91,124,250,0.35); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Dropdown Panel
components.description: Layered pop-up panel for tools and model choices.
components.css: .ds-dropdown { width: 360px; background: #202126; color: #eff2fb; border: 1px solid #3a3d46; border-radius: 14px; box-shadow: 0 18px 48px rgba(0,0,0,0.34); padding: 14px; display: grid; gap: 10px; } .ds-dropdown-title { color: #737988; font: 600 10px/1.2 ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; padding-bottom: 6px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); } .ds-dropdown button { text-align: left; border: 0; border-radius: 8px; padding: 8px; background: transparent; color: #a2a8b6; font: 500 12px/1.2 ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-dropdown button:hover, .ds-dropdown button:focus-visible { background: #2a2b31; color: #eff2fb; outline: 2px solid #5b7cfa; outline-offset: 2px; }

narrative.overview: Flora's interface should feel like a premium local workstation: compact, capable, and quiet enough for repeated use. The visual system uses a DeepSeek-like chat shell across light and dark themes: flat near-black canvas, slim rail, centered thread, rounded bottom composer, and a small blue signal reserved for active state, brand mark, and key values.
keyCharacteristics: Compact app shell with a narrow left rail and centered composer.
Neutral local-console palette with one restrained blue signal.
Local-first product typography with system UI for interface text and system mono for technical values.
Minimal elevation at rest; depth comes from tonal layers, borders, and state.
Calm English voice that avoids accidental language switching.

rules.name: The One Signal Rule
rules.body: The blue signal is for state and trust, not ornament. If more than 10 percent of a screen is accent-colored, the interface is shouting.

rules.name: The Local Status Rule
rules.body: Status colors must describe real local service state. Do not use SaaS-plan colors or upsell cues.

rules.name: The Product Type Rule
rules.body: UI controls use system UI or system mono only. Imported marketing fonts are prohibited.

rules.name: The Flat-At-Rest Rule
rules.body: Default surfaces are flat. Elevation appears only for overlays, focus, or transient state.

dos: Do preserve the local-console palette: #111214, #202126, #eff2fb, and #5b7cfa.
Do make local service state real and visible: Ollama connected/offline, active model, Wan configured/unconfigured.
Do keep user-facing copy fully English with consistent terms.
Do use real semantic controls for clickable UI.
Do keep product density calm and scannable.
donts: Don't make Flora feel like a generic SaaS landing page.
Don't make Flora feel like a noisy AI demo.
Don't use a glassy gradient chatbot clone style.
Don't turn the interface into a cluttered enterprise dashboard.
Don't use Free plan, Upgrade, or plan-language unless the product truly has accounts and billing.
Don't introduce broad decorative gradients, glassmorphism, or wide soft shadows on ordinary controls.
Don't use tiny 9px text for meaningful settings, status, or mobile labels.
